parameters.query:
WITH target_period AS (
  SELECT id, period_year, period_month, status
  FROM payroll_periods
  WHERE ($3::integer IS NULL OR clinic_id = $3::integer)
    AND period_year = $1::integer AND period_month = $2::integer
  LIMIT 1
),
period_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(pe.id)::integer                      AS entries_count,
    COALESCE(SUM(pe.gross_salary), 0)          AS total_gross,
    COALESCE(SUM(pe.net_salary), 0)            AS total_net,
    COALESCE(SUM(pe.total_employer_cost), 0)   AS total_employer_cost,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN pe.status = 'draft' THEN 1 END)::integer AS pending_count
  FROM payroll_entries pe
  JOIN target_period tp ON pe.payroll_period_id = tp.id
),
active_employees AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS cnt
  FROM payroll_employees
  WHERE ($3::integer IS NULL OR clinic_id = $3::integer)
    AND is_active = true
),
active_contracts AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS cnt
  FROM doctor_contracts
  WHERE ($3::integer IS NULL OR clinic_id = $3::integer OR clinic_id IS NULL)
    AND is_active = true
),
prev_period AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(pe.gross_salary), 0) AS prev_gross
  FROM payroll_periods pp
  JOIN payroll_entries pe ON pe.payroll_period_id = pp.id
  WHERE ($3::integer IS NULL OR pp.clinic_id = $3::integer)
    AND (
      (period_month = $2::integer - 1 AND period_year = $1::integer)
      OR ($2::integer = 1 AND period_month = 12 AND period_year = $1::integer - 1)
    )
)
SELECT
  tp.id              AS period_id,
  tp.period_year,
  tp.period_month,
  tp.status          AS period_status,
  COALESCE(ps.entries_count, 0)        AS entries_count,
  COALESCE(ps.total_gross, 0)          AS total_gross,
  COALESCE(ps.total_net, 0)            AS total_net,
  COALESCE(ps.total_employer_cost, 0)  AS total_employer_cost,
  COALESCE(ps.pending_count, 0)        AS pending_count,
  ae.cnt             AS active_employees,
  ac.cnt             AS active_contracts,
  COALESCE(pp.prev_gross, 0)           AS prev_month_gross
FROM target_period tp
CROSS JOIN period_stats ps
CROSS JOIN active_employees ae
CROSS JOIN active_contracts ac
CROSS JOIN prev_period pp

SELECT u.name AS doctor_name, pe.gross_salary, pe.net_salary, pe.sessions_count,
  pe.hours_worked, dc.contract_type, pe.status
FROM payroll_entries pe
JOIN payroll_periods pp ON pe.payroll_period_id = pp.id
JOIN users u ON pe.doctor_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN doctor_contracts dc ON pe.doctor_contract_id = dc.id
WHERE ($3::integer IS NULL OR pp.clinic_id = $3::integer)
  AND pp.period_year = $1::integer AND pp.period_month = $2::integer
ORDER BY pe.gross_salary DESC
LIMIT 10

additionalFields.queryParams: ={{ [$('Parse Dashboard Params').first().json.period_year, $('Parse Dashboard Params').first().json.period_month, $('Parse Dashboard Params').first().json.clinic_id] }}
